title: Slab Variants
description: 100% Vanilla additional versions of blocks when slabs are stacked
body:
An **100% Vanilla** Resource pack that adds Block Variants for when 2 slabs are stacked.

To use the New Variants, stack 2 slabs and they will change to the new texture.

**currently works with:**
- Bricks
- Stone bricks
- Smooth Sandstone
- Smooth Red Sandstone
- Polished Andesite, Diorite and Granite
- Tuff Bricks
- Deepslate Bricks
- Almost all wood planks (Not yet compatible with bamboo)
